LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS KIRK L. PASQUINELLI, DDS, INC.,AND KIRK PASQUINELLI, DDS DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH MEET-AND-CONFER LAWS. THE GOLDMAN DECLARATION FAILS TO SHOW PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED IN PERSON, BY PHONE, OR BY EMAIL AS TO THE OPERATIVE, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. (SEE CCP 430.41(A) ["IF AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ... IS FILED, THE RESPONDING PARTY SHALL MEET AND CONFER AGAIN WITH THE PARTY WHO FILED THE AMENDED PLEADING BEFORE FILING A DEMURRER TO THE AMENDED PLEADING."].) RESPONSE TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 5, 2025. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Burke Hanse, Esq. 415-435-5500 516-848-8332 dratner@goldmanlawfirm.net The Goldman Law Firm for Plaintiff.
Dale Ratner, Esq. 415-435-5500 The Goldman Law Firm for DEFENDANT KIRK L. PASQUINELLI, DDS, INC., KIRK PASQUINELLI, DDS

ARGUED. Mr. Ratner contests failure to comply withmeet and confer laws. Mr. Hansen has nothing to add. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs KIRK L. PASQUINELLI, DDS, INC.,and KIRK PASQUINELLI, DDS DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Off calendar for failure to comply with meet-and-confer laws. The Goldman declaration fails to show parties met and conferred in person, by phone, or by email as to the operative, first amended complaint. (See CCP 430.41(a) ["If an amended complaint ... is filed, the responding party shall meet and confer again with the party who filed the amended pleading before filing a demurrer to the amended pleading."].) Response to the amended complaint is now due by September 5, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
